name: FormSchemaPublisher
purpose: Schema publishing via OCC with DRAFT→PUBLISHED transition; published schemas immutable
ironRules: IR-1: OCC via storeDocumentWithOCC(schema, version, expectedVersion)
IR-2: Published schema.fields immutable — no updates to published version
IR-3: All field validation rules must exist before publish
IR-4: Emit SchemaPublished with schemaId, version, fieldCount
